title: Resource Management - Dashboard
excerpt: Is it possible to connect different boards to one Resource Dashboard?

posts.author: lql (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to connect different boards to one Resource Dashboard?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lql, thanks for posting and asking this question! You can add multiple boards to dashboards in monday.com. Have you already checked out this article?:

  • The Dashboards

posts.author: espmenuiserie (Emmanuel Esperance)
posts.cookedHtml:
oh… the real answer is yes but …
i’ve just noticed that … depends on the type of plan you’re using. in the basic plan, just 1 board by dashboard…

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @espmenuiserie, that’s a good point! On the Basic plan it’s 1 board per dashboard, on the Standard it’s 3, and on Pro it’s 10. Let me know if you have any questions or other feedback!
